issues.description: Missing 'condition' for optional effect. Card text states 'You may trash 1 card' - this requires an optional condition, not automatic execution.
TrashFromHand quantity not specified. Must include 'quantity':1 to match 'trash 1 card'.
SearchDeck filter incomplete. Must include power constraint (2000 or less) and reveal requirement. Current filter only checks cardType, missing power validation and reveal mechanic.
Missing 'quantity' constraint. Card text specifies 'up to 1 Character card' - must set maxQuantity:1.
Missing deck arrangement mechanic. Card text requires 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' - no DSL action captures this step.
